name: Flowglad
long_description: Flowglad is payment infrastructure for agents, with built-in human controls and hard spend limits. Bring your own agent or use ours. Flowglad gives agents the virtual cards, banking, approval flows, and programmable controls they need to spend real money safely. Embed spend policy directly into agent workflows while keeping clear boundaries around who can spend, how much, and under what conditions.
one_liner: Agent payment infra. Program spend + approvals. BYO or use our agents.
